title: OCX Index Catalog Enumeration
description: Full-catalog enumeration snapshot served at /c/index.json. Maps every published package, keyed by bare <namespace>/<package> (no ocx.sh/ prefix, no schema-level ordering guarantee), to the current content digest of its package root — lets a client enumerate or diff the whole catalog without a per-package conditional GET.

format_version.description: Monotonically increasing wire-format generation counter. Named format_version, not version, to stay lexically distinct from package-level version concepts.

packages.description: Every published package, bare <namespace>/<package> to sha256 content digest of its current package root.
